name: onyx
description: ONYX Engineering Workstation — retro desktop OS for GitHub engineering analytics. Zero AI, zero heavy compute, just facts from your git data.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/server & npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/server && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/server && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/server && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/web
